finding_results.notes: Compressed the post-nod interpretation to a single brief sentence keyed to Doug's physical perception, then moved him offstage immediately.

Removed narrator grading of the insurance stretch and later unevenness. The room now signals the loss through coughs, phone glow, selective laughter, the twelfth-row exchange, and Doug continuing anyway.

Rebuilt the abandoned-script turn, the cereal upgrade beat, and Roy's refusal in new wording and cadence while preserving the underlying facts. Also paraphrased Gloria's callback at chapters/chapter_17.md:119 to remove another calibration-line echo.

All three quotable formulations broken into messier live speech. Line 93: 'Nothing is the same as when you got it' replaced with Doug stumbling over whether depreciation is a metaphor or a fact ('I don't actually know if that's a metaphor or just a fact about furnaces'), preserving the insight while making him visibly search. Line 105: 'Polite applause is someone filling out the paperwork on your failure while smiling at you' replaced with a concrete work anecdote — a policyholder thanking Doug for denying their claim — arrived at through a restart and pause rather than delivered as a pre-formed aphorism. Line 123: 'Roy is the only person I know who refused to have an opinion about the worst and best thing I've ever done' replaced with concrete grounding ('Everybody else had a reaction. My mother had notes. My ex-wife — everybody had something to say about it. And Roy just didn't look') followed by visible word-searching ('I keep trying to find the right word for what that is. Generous, I think'), with the final formulation uncertain rather than resolved ('I'm not sure. But I think so'). All three revisions preserve the reader's understanding of Doug's points while making the speech feel found in the moment rather than composed.
Fallback revision report due to validator failure: revisions/cycle_01/chapter_17.p3_prose_copyedit.revision_report.json missing non-empty summary

pass_summaries.summary: Resolved all packet findings by regenerating the flagged dialogue, replacing explicit set-grading with observable room behavior, and tightening the Gloria ending so the nod remains the chapter's controlling image.

Single finding addressed: three polished pull-quote formulations in Doug's unscripted monologue roughened into messier live speech. Line 93 gains a self-interrupting uncertainty about whether he's making a metaphor. Line 105 replaces a standalone aphorism with a grounded work anecdote (claim denial/thank you) reached through restarts. Line 123 replaces an abstract perfect construction with concrete examples of others' reactions contrasted against Roy's silence, and visible searching for the word 'generous.' All changes preserve Doug's idiolect (insurance anchoring, factual precision, moderate contractions) and the chapter's dramatic arc.
Fallback revision report generated after validation failure.
